name: etechflow/module-advanced-product-reviews-hyva
description: Hyvä theme compatibility for ETechFlow Advanced Product Reviews — Tailwind/Alpine storefront rendering driven by the module's GraphQL API (review summary, enhanced review list, helpful voting, media, Q&A).

suggest.hyva-themes/magento2-theme-module: Required at runtime; this module only renders inside the Hyvä theme.
